headline: Will RLS Hyper-Rail Emerge as Ciena's Next Growth Catalyst?
summary: CIEN lands the industry's first multi-rail order as its new RLS Hyper-Rail targets AI-driven demand and aims for revenue and margin gains from 2027.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Arista Networks, Raises Price Target to $190
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Meta Marshall   maintains Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $180 to $190.
